{{CargoRelic
|name=Certificate of Courage
|class_id=20465
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=It is the certificate officially issued by the Traveler Association. It often comes with a big reward and a promotion permit. It is to honor the members who fought heroically in battle, which can boost the morale of the soldiers on the front line effectively.
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=17
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>In Species War, All Minion HARD Stats +0.6%
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>In Species War, All Minion HARD Stats +1.2%
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>In Species War, All Minion HARD Stats +1.8%
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3<br>In Species War, All Minion HARD Stats +1.8%
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br>In Species War, All Minion HARD Stats +1.8%<br> (Awakened)
}}
